honest_note: Every entry here is a target that had ZERO prior coverage anywhere in the 0n1x pipeline until onyx_gap_scanner found and verified it this round. onyx_synthesis.absorb_pool() additively merges these into its own facts pool on its NEXT round — net-new coverage flowing from origination into combination.
